title: Finally sleeping cool
body: These feel noticeably cooler than our old cotton percale. First night I didn’t wake up sweaty. They wrinkle a bit (linen!) but I like the relaxed look.
author: Jenna W.

title: Soft after a couple washes
body: Out of the bag they felt a tiny bit scratchy but after two washes they softened up nicely. Cooling effect is subtle but real.
author: Marco P.

title: Fitted sheet is snug on 15" mattress
body: We have a 15-inch pillow-top and the fitted sheet barely fits. It stays on but it’s tight. Wish there was a deeper pocket option.
author: Arjun P.

title: Perfect summer sheets
body: Exactly what I wanted for summer. Lightweight, breathable, and the color looks premium.
author: Kristin L.

title: Not as soft as expected
body: I knew linen has texture but these felt rough to me even after a wash. Might not be for those who prefer silky smooth.
author: Derek S.

title: Stays cooler through the night
body: I run hot and usually wake up sweating. These regulate temperature better. They do wrinkle a lot though.
author: Olivia R.

title: Great quality, fair price
body: For the quality of linen, the price is very reasonable. Stitching looks solid. Would buy again.
author: James H.

title: Color a bit different than photos
body: The 'Stone' color leans warmer in person than on my screen. Not a deal breaker but worth noting.
author: Sara V.

title: Helps with night sweats
body: Cooling feel is legit. If you expect ice cold, that’s unrealistic, but it definitely feels drier and cooler.
author: Pat M.

title: Wrinkles don’t bother me
body: It’s linen so yes, wrinkles. But the drape is beautiful and airy. Great for our coastal home.
author: Nina C.

title: Cooling yes, pockets could be deeper
body: Feels cool and breathable. Would love a 17" deep pocket option. For now it’s snug on our 14.5" mattress.
author: Ethan R.

title: Returned due to texture
body: Even after washing twice I couldn’t get past the rough feel. Customer service was helpful with the return.
author: Lauren T.
